examples: Tangerine has become infatuated with her cousin orange for a while. Calling up all her courage, she goes over to him eventually.
The effort to remove dirt, and imbue bodies and bathrooms with the scent of tangerine, mint or almond instead, is a big business.
As the sky lightens to delicate shades of pale blue and tangerine, we reach the peak.
And I won't weep if the likes of the Mazda Tangerine Bowl get squeezed out.
